title: Shattered Hearts
description: Vanilla+ PVP oriented modpack in which killing someone steals their heart, with a myriad of decorative mods.
body: Shattered Hearts Modpack is a PvP-oriented modpack where whenever you kill someone, you steal one of their hearts. The modpack is primarily vanilla, with revamped structures, revamped combat, and more. The modpack adds a new magic system, a skill tree with significant depth, along with a myriad of decorative mods in order to make your builds look nicer, as well as built in voice chat.
